exam_price_notes: Single On-Demand Certification Course starting at $1,699

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored via EC-Council's own portal
In-person at Pearson VUE authorized test centers

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name and photo. ID must match the name used during registration.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or electronic devices. No internet access during exam. Scratch paper may be provided. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Earn 120 ECE (EC-Council Continuing Education) credits over 3-year cycle. ECE credits earned through courses, conferences, publications, or EC-Council activities.
target_audience: Cybersecurity professionals, IT security professionals, and individuals interested in ethical hacking.
recommended_experience: Minimum of 2 years of IT security experience.

prerequisites.description: 2 years of information security work experience (waived with official EC-Council training)

retake_policy.notes: No official waiting period specified between retakes. Full exam fee required for each retake.

objectives.title: Understand the fundamentals of ethical hacking, information security controls, and relevant laws and procedures.
sub_objectives: Understand the elements of information security.
Classify attacks and hacker classes.
Understand the ethical hacking framework and AI-driven ethical hacking.
Understand the Cyber Kill Chain Methodology and MITRE ATT&CK Framework.

objectives.title: Perform footprinting and reconnaissance using various tools and techniques.
sub_objectives: Perform footprinting using search engines, internet research services, and social networking sites.
Perform whois, DNS, network, and email footprinting.
Perform footprinting using AI.

objectives.title: Perform network scanning techniques and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform host, port, service, and OS discovery on the target network.
Perform scanning on the target network beyond IDS and Firewall.
Perform scanning using AI.

objectives.title: Perform enumeration techniques using various tools and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform NetBIOS, SNMP, LDAP, NFS, DNS, SMTP, RPC, SMB, and FTP Enumeration.
Perform enumeration using AI.
Understand enumeration countermeasures.

objectives.title: Identify security loopholes in a target organization’s network, communication infrastructure, and end systems.
sub_objectives: Perform vulnerability research using vulnerability scoring systems and databases.
Perform vulnerability assessment using various tools.
Perform vulnerability analysis using AI.

objectives.title: Perform system hacking methodologies to discover system and network vulnerabilities.
sub_objectives: Perform active online attacks to crack system passwords.
Perform buffer overflow attacks to gain access to a remote system.
Escalate privileges using privilege escalation tools.
Use steganography to hide data.
Clear logs using various utilities.
Perform system hacking using AI.

objectives.title: Understand different types of malware, malware analysis procedures, and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Gain control over a victim machine using a Trojan.
Infect a target system using a virus.
Perform static and dynamic malware analysis.
Understand AI-based malware and countermeasures.

objectives.title: Perform packet-sniffing techniques and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform MAC flooding, ARP poisoning, and MITM attacks.
Spoof a MAC address of a Linux machine.
Perform network sniffing using various sniffing tools.
Detect ARP poisoning in a switch-based network.

objectives.title: Understand social engineering concepts and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform social engineering using various techniques.
Detect phishing attacks.
Use AI for social engineering.
Understand social engineering countermeasures.

objectives.title: Understand different Denial of Service (DoS) and Distributed DoS (DDoS) attack techniques and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform a DoS and DDoS attack on a target host.
Detect and protect against DoS and DDoS attacks.

objectives.title: Understand session hijacking techniques and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform session hijacking using various tools.
Detect session hijacking.
Understand session hijacking detection methods.

objectives.title: Understand firewall, intrusion detection system (IDS), and honeypot evasion techniques and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform intrusion detection using various tools.
Deploy honeypot to detect malicious network traffic.
Bypass firewall rules using tunneling.
Bypass antivirus.

objectives.title: Perform web server attacks and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform web server reconnaissance using various tools.
Enumerate web server information.
Perform a web server attack.
Perform web server hacking using AI.

objectives.title: Perform web application attacks and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform web application reconnaissance using various tools.
Perform web spidering.
Perform web application vulnerability scanning.
Perform web application attacks.
Detect web application vulnerabilities using various tools.
Perform web application hacking using AI.

objectives.title: Understand SQL injection attack techniques, evasion techniques, and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Perform an SQL injection attack against MSSQL to extract databases.
Detect SQL injection vulnerabilities using various tools.
Perform SQL injection using AI.

objectives.title: Understand wireless network hacking methodologies, tools, and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Footprint a wireless network.
Perform wireless traffic analysis.
Crack a WPA2 network.
Create a rogue access point.

objectives.title: Understand mobile platform attack vectors, security guidelines, and tools.
sub_objectives: Hack an Android device by creating binary payloads.
Exploit the Android platform through ADB.
Hack an Android device by creating APK file.
Secure Android devices using various Android security tools.

objectives.title: Understand IoT and OT hacking methodologies, tools, and countermeasures.
sub_objectives: Gather information using online footprinting tools.
Capture and analyze IoT device traffic.
Perform IoT attacks.

objectives.title: Understand cloud computing threats, attacks, methodologies, and security tools.
sub_objectives: Perform S3 bucket enumeration using various tools.
Exploit open S3 buckets.
Escalate IAM user privileges by exploiting misconfigured user policy.
Perform vulnerability assessment on Docker images.

objectives.title: Understand encryption algorithms, cryptography tools, and cryptanalysis techniques.
sub_objectives: Encrypt information using various cryptography tools.
Create and use self-signed certificates.
Perform email and disk encryption.
Perform cryptanalysis using various tools.
Perform cryptography using AI.
